mapper.insert: insert into biz_community_activity ( creator_user_id, title, activity_type, location, start_time, end_time, pet_size_limit, max_participants, current_participants, status, review_status, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{creatorUserId}, #{title}, #{activityType}, #{location}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{petSizeLimit}, #{maxParticipants}, 0, #{status}, #{reviewStatus}, #{description}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update biz_community_activity set review_status = #{reviewStatus}, review_note = #{reviewNote}, review_by = #{reviewBy}, review_time = sysdate(), status = case when #{reviewStatus} = '1' then '1' else '3' end, update_by = #{reviewBy}, update_time = sysdate() where activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: select activity_id as activityId, title, review_status as reviewStatus, max_participants as maxParticipants, current_participants as currentParticipants, status, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime from biz_community_activity where activity_id = #{activityId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into biz_activity_signup ( activity_id, user_id, pet_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{activityId}, #{userId}, #{petId}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update biz_community_activity set current_participants = current_participants + 1, update_time = sysdate() where activity_id = #{activityId} and (max_participants is null or max_participants = 0 or current_participants < max_participants)
mapper.select: select s.signup_id as signupId, s.activity_id as activityId, s.pet_id as petId, s.status as signupStatus, s.create_time as signupTime, a.title as activityTitle, a.activity_type as activityType, a.location as location, a.start_time as startTime, a.end_time as endTime, p.pet_name as petName from biz_activity_signup s left join biz_community_activity a on a.activity_id = s.activity_id left join biz_pet_info p on p.pet_id = s.pet_id where s.user_id = #{userId} and s.status = '0' order by s.create_time desc
